rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Inventory And Accounting
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 7, 2017. as stated in the lsat tentative ruling, petitioner must provide a hard copy of his petition, including all exhibits, to the examiner in room 202 no less than 3 court days prior to the hearing. in addition, a supplemental declaration must be filed. new deadline is wednesday, august 2. if a full copy is not received, an appearance will be required on august 7 for the sole issue of determining whether the petition should be taken off calendar. note-->faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted.
